title: BULK load failing for NUMERIC columns
poc:
CREATE TABLE bulk2 (
         id NUMERIC(9, 0) NOT NULL,
         fax NUMERIC(10, 0),
         phone NUMERIC(10, 0),
         acctnum NUMERIC(7, 0),
         PRIMARY KEY (id)
 );
key_bug_features: BULK load fails with NUMERIC column types
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE bulk2 (id NUMERIC(9, 0) NOT NULL, fax NUMERIC(10, 0), phone NUMERIC(10, 0), acctnum NUMERIC(7, 0), PRIMARY KEY (id));
INSERT INTO bulk2 (id, fax, phone, acctnum) VALUES (1, 1234567890, NULL, 1234567);
INSERT INTO bulk2 (id, fax, phone, acctnum) VALUES (2, NULL, 9876543210, NULL);
SELECT * FROM bulk2 WHERE fax IS NOT NULL AND phone IS NULL;
UPDATE bulk2 SET fax = CAST('9999999999' AS NUMERIC(10, 0)) WHERE id = 1;
